description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Tests that runs on every push and pull request. Use a matrix strategy to test multiple Python versions (3.8, 3.9, 3.10, 3.11) on different operating systems (ubuntu-20.04, macOS-11, windows-2019) and variants (py, py-images). For each job, check out the repository, set up the specified Python version with caching, install tox, and run tests with tox.
